scripts.container:run:feed: docker run --rm maintenance-data-simulator:local feed --scenario baseline-week --api-url http://host.docker.internal:5000 --api-token local-reviewer-token
scripts.container:run:feed:dry-run: docker run --rm maintenance-data-simulator:local feed --scenario baseline-week --api-url http://host.docker.internal:5000 --dry-run
scripts.container:run:feed:bulk: docker run --rm maintenance-data-simulator:local feed --scenario baseline-week --repeat 25 --batch-size 50 --api-url http://host.docker.internal:5000 --api-token local-reviewer-token
scripts.container:run:api-smoke: docker run --rm maintenance-data-simulator:local api-smoke --scenario baseline-week --api-url http://host.docker.internal:5000 --api-token local-reviewer-token
scripts.verify: node --test && node scripts/quality-guards.mjs all && node scripts/scenario-smoke.mjs
